verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Into the chamber, be free Holy Spirit Speak to me gently as I close the door Heavenly Lover, let Thy presence cover Shekinah unending, is all I long for

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Father I worship You out of my spirit Praising and thanking You in my own way Your heart I covet, Lord Your will and purpose Into submission I surrender this day
